workspace.description: The workspace that the membership is describing. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.workspace record on the workspace owner's or admin's repository.

invite.description: The original invite record for the workspace. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.chat.workspace.invite record on the workspace owner's or admin's repository.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this membership was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when this membership was last updated.

main.description: Record declaring the state of a user's workspace membership.
